message:
feat(planner): strengthen partial-index predicate matching with commuted comparisons and range bounds

Extend where_terms_imply_predicate() beyond structural equality to
accept commuted equality/range comparisons, stronger range bounds on the
same column, and non-NULL inference from equality predicates. This lets
the planner use partial indexes in more cases where the WHERE clause
logically implies the index predicate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
